final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fine-art-portrait
Asset type: museum-grade oil painting, classical portrait
Primary request: contemporary professional woman portrait in Rembrandt lighting technique, Dutch Golden Age style
Scene/backdrop: deep brown dark background, minimal detail, void-like atmosphere to focus attention on subject
Subject: 35-year-old East Asian woman in dark business suit, wise and resolute expression, holding a thick book with meticulously rendered hands showing knuckle and skin texture
Style/medium: classical oil painting, thick impasto brushwork, visible paint texture, Rembrandt chiaroscuro technique
Composition/framing: bust portrait with hands, three-quarter view, classic triangular highlight on cheek
Lighting/mood: Rembrandt lighting creating triangular highlight on one side of face, soft shadows on the other side, dramatic yet intimate
Color palette: brown umber, ochre, deep crimson, warm white highlights on face only
Materials/textures: heavy oil paint strokes, rich pigment texture, realistic skin rendering, fabric of dark suit, aged book pages
Constraints: preserve the triangular Rembrandt light pattern on face, keep background dark and minimal, hands must show detailed anatomy and skin texture
Avoid: modern photographic look, flat lighting, colorful background, digital smoothness, watermark, signature
